subject: Docs Gap Report: README.md vs Codebase — 2026-05-23
body:
# README.md vs Codebase — Gap Report
_Generated by Argus Weld · 2026-05-23_

---

## 1. MainWindow Size Claim Is Dramatically Wrong

README states: _"MainWindow is **5,605 lines** (down from 8,305 before decomposition)"_

Actual line count: **30,279 lines**

The file has grown 5× beyond what the README describes. The narrative of successful decomposition is no longer accurate.

---

## 2. All Helper Class Line Counts Are Stale

| File | README says | Actual |
|---|---|---|
| `AgentStatusCard.cs` | 322 | 404 |
| `ColorUtilities.cs` | 54 | 65 |
| `SquadCliAdapter.cs` | 124 | 175 |
| `PushToTalkController.cs` | 243 | 289 |
| `MarkdownDocumentRenderer.cs` | 772 | **1,183** |
| `AgentThreadRegistry.cs` | 840 | **1,063** |
| `TranscriptConversationManager.cs` | 481 | **1,761** |
| `BackgroundTaskPresenter.cs` | 813 | **1,256** |
| `PromptExecutionController.cs` | 923 | **2,468** |

---

## 3. AI Team Roster Missing 7 of 13 Agents

README lists 6. `.squad/team.md` has 13. Missing: Orion Vale, Sorin Pyre, Atlas Wren, Scribe, Ralph, Argus Weld, Malik Graves.

---

## 4. Project Structure Omits 5 Directories

| Directory | Notes |
|---|---|
| `VoiceHeuristics/` | Standalone NuGet-published library with own README |
| `docs/` | 100+ end-user documentation files (Jekyll site) |
| `Run/` | Hot-swap runtime slots (A/, B/, active-slot.json) |
| `artifacts/` | Build artifacts |
| `installer/` | Installer project |

---

## 5. Ten+ Major Feature Areas Missing From README

Maintenance Mode, Inbox Panel, Notes Panel, Loop Panel, Approvals Panel, Tasks Panel, Host/Slash Commands, Prompt Queue, Remote Control, Screenshot/Fixture Testing, Whisper Speech — all undocumented in README.

---

## 6. Squad CLI Version Is Insider Build (Undocumented)

`package.json` pins `@bradygaster/squad-cli` at `^0.9.5-insider.1`. README gives no version qualifier.

---

## Priority Summary

| Severity | Finding |
|---|---|
| 🔴 High | MainWindow 5× wrong (30,279 vs 5,605) |
| 🔴 High | 7 of 13 team agents missing |
| 🟠 Medium | All 9 helper class counts stale |
| 🟠 Medium | VoiceHeuristics/ and docs/ absent from structure |
| 🟠 Medium | 10+ major features undocumented |
| 🟡 Low | Squad CLI insider build not surfaced |

---

> *Note: This report was generated correctly by Argus Weld on 2026-05-23 but was not delivered due to a bug where QUICK_REPLIES_JSON blocks after the INBOX_MESSAGE_JSON block broke the parser regex. That bug has been fixed in commit 4e33bd2.*

actions.label: Update README
actions.prompt: Mira Quill: Argus Weld ran a doc-vs-codebase audit on 2026-05-23. Please update README.md at D:\Drive\Source\SquadDash-public\README.md. Do not modify any .cs source files. Key issues: (1) MainWindow.xaml.cs line count is 30,279 not 5,605. (2) All 9 helper class line counts are stale. (3) AI Team section lists 6 agents but team.md has 13 — add Orion Vale, Sorin Pyre, Atlas Wren, Scribe, Ralph, Argus Weld, Malik Graves. (4) Project structure missing VoiceHeuristics/ (NuGet library), docs/ (Jekyll site), Run/, artifacts/, installer/. (5) No mention of Maintenance Mode, Inbox, Loop, Approvals, Tasks, Host Commands, Prompt Queue, RC, Whisper speech. (6) Squad CLI install needs ^0.9.5-insider.1 qualifier.
